name: 9-factor-rag
title: 9-factor-rag
summary: Audit RAG systems for retrieval quality, chunking, indexing, citation, context control, evaluation, freshness, and answer trustworthiness.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 9-factor-rag skill to audit this RAG project for retrieval quality, chunking, indexing, citation, context control, and evaluation.
review_protocol: Identify project type and user-facing goal.
Inspect relevant files and infer missing context conservatively.
Run available validation commands or record why they could not run.
